mapper.insert: INSERT INTO accounts (business_id, country, customer_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{businessId, jdbcType=OTHER}, #{country}, #{customerId, jdbcType=OTHER}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, business_id, country, customer_id, created_at, updated_at FROM accounts WHERE customer_id = #{customerId, jdbcType=OTHER} ORDER BY created_at DESC
